title: Software Update - DFU - Headset at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: DFU blocked with pop-up when headset battery is below 5%, but proceeds if plugged into charger
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
2. Navigate to Home screen and connect to the headset.
3. Go to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Firmware Update.
4. Ensure the headset battery level is below 5% and not connected to a charger.
5. Attempt to initiate a DFU (Device Firmware Update).
7. Plug the headset into a charger while battery is still below 5%.
8. Attempt to initiate the DFU again.
10. While the update is in progress and battery is still below 5%, unplug the headset from the charger.
expected: 1. Step 5: The app should display a pop-up with the message "Update currently not available, please try back later" and the update should not proceed. 2. Step 8: The update should proceed and complete successfully. 3. Step 10: The pop-up "Update currently not available, please try back later" should reappear and the update should be interrupted or prevented.
